function createHtmlDocument (message) { var body = escapeHtml(message) .replaceAll('\n', '
') .replaceAll(' ', '  ') return '\n' + '\n' + '\n' + '\n' + 'Error\n' + '\n' + '\n' + '
' + body + '
\n' + '\n' + '\n' }

function createHtmlDocument (title, body) { return '\n' + '\n' + '\n' + '\n' + '' + title + '\n' + '\n' + '\n' + '
' + body + '
\n' + '\n' + '\n' }
